name: Berries in Custard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt: 1/2 teaspoon
2. Vanilla extract: 1/2 teaspoon
3. Fresh blueberries, raspberries, and strawberries
In a saucepan, scald the milk. Combine the egg and sugar in a bowl; stir in a small amount of hot milk. Return all to the saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens slightly and coats a spoon (about 15 minutes). Remove from the heat; stir in salt and vanilla. Chill for at least 1 hour. Serve over berries.
